requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Kyrgyzstan Local Fire Authority and Soviet-Heritage Building and Fire Code Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——吉尔吉斯斯坦地方消防主管机关及苏联遗留建筑消防规范要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——吉爾吉斯斯坦地方消防主管機關及蘇聯遺留建築消防規範要求

summary.en: Fire safety in Kyrgyzstan is regulated at the national level by the Ministry of Emergency Situations (MChS, Министерство чрезвычайных ситуаций) and enforced locally by the State Fire Service (Gospozharnadzor). All commercial and industrial BESS installations require fire-safety design review and approval from the local fire authority (Gospozharnadzor) before construction permit and commissioning. Kyrgyzstan's fire and building codes derive from the Soviet-era regulatory system and are based primarily on SNiP (Строительные нормы и правила — Building Norms and Rules), SP (Свод правил — Design Codes), and NPB (Нормы пожарной безопасности — Fire Safety Norms) inherited from or adapted from Russian regulatory practice. NFPA codes are not the reference framework in Kyrgyzstan. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based BESS) is the relevant international safety standard and is expected to be referenced in project specifications for internationally financed projects. EAEU member states may also reference harmonised GOST R standards adopted from IEC/EN. No confirmed publicly accessible Kyrgyzstan-specific fire installation standard dedicated to stationary lithium BESS (equivalent to NFPA 855 or EN 50604) has been identified as of the dataset date; direct engagement with the local Gospozharnadzor authority is essential to determine applicable requirements for each installation site.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦消防安全由紧急情况部（MChS，Министерство чрезвычайных ситуаций）在国家层面监管，由国家消防监督局（Gospozharnadzor）在地方层面执法。所有商业及工业BESS装置在获得施工许可和投入使用前，须取得当地消防主管机关（Gospozharnadzor）的消防安全设计审查和批准。吉尔吉斯斯坦消防和建筑规范源自苏联时期法规体系，主要基于SNiP（建筑规范和规则）、SP（设计规范集）和NPB（消防安全标准），继承自或改编自俄罗斯法规实践。NFPA规范不是吉尔吉斯斯坦的参考框架。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学BESS安全要求）是相关国际安全标准，预计在国际融资项目规格中被引用。EAEU成员国也可能引用从IEC/EN采纳的协调GOST R标准。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认吉尔吉斯斯坦存在专门针对固定式锂BESS的公开消防安装标准（相当于NFPA 855或EN 50604）；须就每个安装场址直接与当地Gospozharnadzor主管机关接触以确定适用要求。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦消防安全由緊急情況部（MChS，Министерство чрезвычайных ситуаций）在國家層面監管，由國家消防監督局（Gospozharnadzor）在地方層面執法。所有商業及工業BESS裝置在獲得施工許可和投入使用前，須取得當地消防主管機關（Gospozharnadzor）的消防安全設計審查和批准。吉爾吉斯斯坦消防和建築規範源自蘇聯時期法規體系，主要基於SNiP（建築規範和規則）、SP（設計規範集）和NPB（消防安全標準），繼承自或改編自俄羅斯法規實踐。NFPA規範不是吉爾吉斯斯坦的參考框架。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學BESS安全要求）是相關國際安全標準，預計在國際融資項目規格中被引用。EAEU成員國也可能引用從IEC/EN採納的協調GOST R標準。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認吉爾吉斯斯坦存在專門針對固定式鋰BESS的公開消防安裝標準（相當於NFPA 855或EN 50604）；須就每個安裝場址直接與當地Gospozharnadzor主管機關接觸以確定適用要求。

standards_or_laws: Kyrgyzstan Ministry of Emergency Situations (MChS) — national fire safety regulator
Gospozharnadzor (State Fire Service / Fire Safety Inspectorate) — local authority having jurisdiction; design approval and commissioning inspection mandatory

SNiP (Строительные нормы и правила) — Soviet-heritage Building Norms and Rules adopted in Kyrgyzstan; applicable SNiP for electrical installation and fire protection must be confirmed with local authority
SP (Свод правил) — Design Codes; applicable SP series for storage facilities and electrical energy systems must be confirmed
NPB (Нормы пожарной безопасности) — Fire Safety Norms; applicable NPB series must be confirmed
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected reference in internationally financed project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Ministry of Emergency Management. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Kyrgyzstan's Gospozharnadzor as equivalent to Kyrgyzstan's SNiP/SP/NPB-based requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with documentation aligned with applicable Kyrgyzstan SNiP/SP norms and reviewed by a licensed local fire-safety engineer for Gospozharnadzor design approval.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由应急管理部下属地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被吉尔吉斯斯坦Gospozharnadzor认可为等同于吉尔吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB体系要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须补充符合吉尔吉斯斯坦适用SNiP/SP规范的文件，并由持牌当地消防安全工程师审核后向Gospozharnadzor提交设计审批。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由應急管理部下屬地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被吉爾吉斯斯坦Gospozharnadzor認可為等同於吉爾吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB體系要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須補充符合吉爾吉斯斯坦適用SNiP/SP規範的文件，並由持牌當地消防安全工程師審核後向Gospozharnadzor提交設計審批。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Gospozharnadzor fire-safety design approval is a mandatory installation gate for all commercial and industrial BESS in Kyrgyzstan. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Kyrgyzstan's SNiP/SP/NPB-based requirements. Kyrgyzstan does not use NFPA codes. Exporters and project teams should: (a) engage Gospozharnadzor (local district office) at the earliest project stage to determine the applicable SNiP, SP, and NPB fire norms for stationary electrochemical energy storage installations; (b) appoint a licensed Kyrgyzstan fire-safety engineer to prepare fire-safety design documentation (пожарно-техническое задание / проект пожарной защиты) in the required format for Gospozharnadzor review; (c) prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned technical evidence for the BESS system's thermal runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, ventilation, fire suppression, and emergency shutdown — especially relevant for internationally financed projects where lenders or EPCs reference IEC standards; (d) cold-climate considerations — ensure fire-suppression system components are rated for Kyrgyzstan's winter operating temperatures (which can reach -30°C or below in mountainous regions); (e) verify whether any EAEU GOST standards harmonised from IEC or EN have been adopted by Kyrgyzstandart for stationary BESS fire safety and whether they are referenced by Gospozharnadzor.
gap.zh: 差距：Gospozharnadzor消防安全设计审批是吉尔吉斯斯坦所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足吉尔吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB体系要求。吉尔吉斯斯坦不使用NFPA规范。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在项目最早阶段与Gospozharnadzor（当地区级办公室）接触，确定适用于固定式电化学储能装置的SNiP、SP和NPB消防规范；（b）聘请持牌吉尔吉斯斯坦消防安全工程师，按Gospozharnadzor审查所需格式准备消防安全设计文件（消防技术任务书/消防防护设计）；（c）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS系统热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测、通风、消防抑制及紧急停机技术证据——对于贷款方或EPC承包商引用IEC标准的国际融资项目尤为重要；（d）寒冷气候考量——确保消防抑制系统组件按吉尔吉斯斯坦冬季运行温度额定（山区可低至-30°C或以下）；（e）核实Kyrgyzstandart是否采纳了从IEC或EN协调转化的EAEU GOST标准用于固定式BESS消防安全，以及Gospozharnadzor是否引用这些标准。
gap.zht: 差距：Gospozharnadzor消防安全設計審批是吉爾吉斯斯坦所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足吉爾吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB體系要求。吉爾吉斯斯坦不使用NFPA規範。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在項目最早階段與Gospozharnadzor（當地區級辦公室）接觸，確定適用於固定式電化學儲能裝置的SNiP、SP和NPB消防規範；（b）聘請持牌吉爾吉斯斯坦消防安全工程師，按Gospozharnadzor審查所需格式準備消防安全設計文件（消防技術任務書/消防防護設計）；（c）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS系統熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測、通風、消防抑制及緊急停機技術證據——對於貸款方或EPC承包商引用IEC標準的國際融資項目尤為重要；（d）寒冷氣候考量——確保消防抑制系統組件按吉爾吉斯斯坦冬季運行溫度額定（山區可低至-30°C或以下）；（e）核實Kyrgyzstandart是否採納了從IEC或EN協調轉化的EAEU GOST標準用於固定式BESS消防安全，以及Gospozharnadzor是否引用這些標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Gospozharnadzor fire-safety design approval and commissioning inspection are required for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Kyrgyzstan; applicable SNiP/SP/NPB norms must be confirmed directly with the local authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Ministry of Emergency Management

source.publisher: Ministry of Emergency Situations of the Kyrgyz Republic (МЧС КР) — parent authority of Gospozharnadzor

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gospozharnadzor fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Kyrgyzstan. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Kyrgyzstan's SNiP/SP/NPB-based requirements; NFPA codes are not the applicable framework. Engage Gospozharnadzor and a licensed local fire-safety engineer at the earliest project stage to determine applicable fire norms for stationary electrochemical storage. Fire suppression and detection equipment must be rated for Kyrgyzstan's cold-climate operating temperatures. For internationally financed projects, prepare IEC 62933-5-2 technical evidence in addition to local fire authority submissions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Gospozharnadzor消防安全审批是吉尔吉斯斯坦商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足吉尔吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB体系要求；NFPA规范不是适用框架。在项目最早阶段与Gospozharnadzor及持牌当地消防安全工程师接触，确定固定式电化学储能适用消防规范。消防抑制和探测设备须按吉尔吉斯斯坦寒冷气候运行温度额定。对于国际融资项目，除提交当地消防主管机关申请文件外，还须准备IEC 62933-5-2技术证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Gospozharnadzor消防安全審批是吉爾吉斯斯坦商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足吉爾吉斯斯坦SNiP/SP/NPB體系要求；NFPA規範不是適用框架。在項目最早階段與Gospozharnadzor及持牌當地消防安全工程師接觸，確定固定式電化學儲能適用消防規範。消防抑制和探測設備須按吉爾吉斯斯坦寒冷氣候運行溫度額定。對於國際融資項目，除提交當地消防主管機關申請文件外，還須準備IEC 62933-5-2技術證據。
